scripts.native:dev: pnpm build && sh scripts/portless.sh ghostd-web pnpm native:run
scripts.native:run: pnpm build:web && sh scripts/zig-015.sh build run --cache-dir .zig-cache --global-cache-dir .zig-cache
scripts.native:test: pnpm build:web && sh scripts/zig-015.sh build test --cache-dir .zig-cache --global-cache-dir .zig-cache
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @ghostd-web/core type-check && pnpm --filter @ghostd-web/dom type-check && tsc --project web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ghostd-web/dom test && pnpm native:test && pnpm e2e
